<<<FILE path="t-input.theme.less">>>
/**
 * Input 样式（与 @tdesign/uniapp 视觉对齐：列表内嵌型、下分割线、状态色）
 * 全部颜色 / 间距走 CSS Variables，命名沿用 --td-input-* 系列。
 */

// ------- 默认 token -------
@td-input-vertical-padding: var(--td-input-vertical-padding, 16px);
@td-input-horizontal-padding: var(--td-input-horizontal-padding, 16px);

@td-input-bg-color: var(--td-input-bg-color, #ffffff);
@td-input-text-color: var(--td-input-default-text-color, #181818);
@td-input-disabled-text-color: var(--td-input-disabled-text-color, #c0c0c0);
@td-input-placeholder-text-color: var(--td-input-placeholder-text-color, #c0c0c0);

@td-input-label-color: var(--td-input-label-text-color, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9));
@td-input-suffix-text-color: var(--td-input-suffix-text-color, #181818);
@td-input-suffix-icon-color: var(--td-input-suffix-icon-color, #c0c0c0);
@td-input-prefix-icon-color: var(--td-input-prefix-icon-color, #181818);

@td-input-border-color: var(--td-input-border-color, #e7e7e7);
@td-input-border-left-space: var(--td-input-border-left-space, 16px);
@td-input-border-right-space: var(--td-input-border-right-space, 0);
@td-input-align-items: var(--td-input-align-items, center);

@td-input-success-color: var(--td-input-success-tips-color, #2ba471);
@td-input-warning-color: var(--td-input-warning-tips-color, #ed7b2f);
@td-input-error-color: var(--td-input-error-tips-color, #d54941);

@td-input-label-min-width: var(--td-input-label-min-width, 32px);
@td-input-label-max-width: var(--td-input-label-max-width, 80px);

.t-input {
  display: flex;
  align-items: @td-input-align-items;
  flex-direction: row;
  width: 100%;
  padding: @td-input-vertical-padding @td-input-horizontal-padding;
  background-color: @td-input-bg-color;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;

  // ---- 下分割线（borderless=false 时） ----
  &--border::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: @td-input-border-left-space;
    right: @td-input-border-right-space;
    bottom: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background-color: @td-input-border-color;
    transform: scaleY(0.5);
    transform-origin: 0 100%;
  }

  // ---- 竖排 ----
  &--layout-vertical {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  // ---- prefix 区（icon + label） ----
  &__wrap--prefix {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-right: 16px;
  }

  &__icon--prefix {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    color: @td-input-prefix-icon-color;
    font-size: 24px;
    margin-right: 4px;

    &:empty {
      display: none;
    }
  }

  &__label {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    color: @td-input-label-color;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 24px;
    word-wrap: break-word;

    &:empty {
      display: none;
    }
  }

  &__label-text {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: @td-input-label-color;
    line-height: 24px;
  }

  &--layout-vertical &__wrap--prefix {
    margin-right: 0;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  &--layout-vertical &__label {
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-right: 0;
  }

  &--layout-vertical &__label-text {
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  // ---- 内容主体 wrap ----
  &__wrap {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
    flex-shrink: 1;
    min-width: 0;
    width: 100%;
  }

  &__content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 24px;
  }

  // ---- input 控件 ----
  &__control {
    flex: 1;
    display: block;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
    min-height: 24px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    border: 0;
    background: transparent;
    color: @td-input-text-color;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 24px;

    &--disabled {
      color: @td-input-disabled-text-color;
      cursor: not-allowed;
    }

    &--read-only {
      cursor: default;
    }
  }

  &__placeholder {
    color: @td-input-placeholder-text-color;
    font-size: 16px;

    &--disabled {
      color: @td-input-disabled-text-color;
    }
  }

  // ---- 文本对齐 ----
  &--left   { text-align: left; }
  &--center { text-align: center; }
  &--right  { text-align: right; }

  // ---- 后置区域 ----
  &__wrap--clearable-icon,
  &__wrap--suffix-icon,
  &__wrap--suffix {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    padding-left: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;

    &:empty {
      display: none;
    }
  }

  &__wrap--clearable-icon,
  &__wrap--suffix-icon {
    color: @td-input-suffix-icon-color;
    font-size: 24px;
  }

  &__wrap--suffix {
    color: @td-input-suffix-text-color;
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  // 兜底的 ✕（无 t-icon 时使用）
  &__clear-fallback {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    line-height: 18px;
    text-align: center;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #c5c5c5;
    color: #ffffff;
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  // ---- tips ----
  &__tips {
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 20px;
    padding-top: 4px;

    &.t-input--default { color: @td-input-placeholder-text-color; }
    &.t-input--success { color: @td-input-success-color; }
    &.t-input--warning { color: @td-input-warning-color; }
    &.t-input--error   { color: @td-input-error-color; }
  }

  &__tips-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 20px;
  }

  // ---- 禁用 / 只读 ----
  &--disabled .t-input__control,
  &--readonly .t-input__control {
    color: @td-input-disabled-text-color;
  }
}
<<<END>>>

<<<FILE path="t-input.uvue">>>
<template>
  <view :class="rootClass">
    <!-- ① prefix 区：图标 + 标签 -->
    <view v-if="showPrefix" class="t-input__wrap--prefix">
      <view v-if="hasPrefixIconSlot || prefixIcon.length > 0" class="t-input__icon--prefix">
        <slot name="prefix-icon">
          <text v-if="prefixIcon.length > 0">{{ prefixIcon }}</text>
        </slot>
      </view>
      <view v-if="hasLabelSlot || label.length > 0" class="t-input__label">
        <slot name="label">
          <text v-if="label.length > 0" class="t-input__label-text">{{ label }}</text>
        </slot>
      </view>
    </view>

    <!-- ② 主体 wrap -->
    <view class="t-input__wrap">
      <view class="t-input__content" @click="onClick">
        <input
          :class="controlClass"
          :type="inputType"
          :password="type === 'password'"
          :value="dataValue"
          :placeholder="placeholder"
          :placeholder-style="placeholderStyle"
          :placeholder-class="finalPlaceholderClass"
          :disabled="disabled || readonly"
          :maxlength="effectiveMaxlength"
          :focus="focus || autoFocus"
          :confirm-type="confirmType"
          :confirm-hold="confirmHold"
          :adjust-position="adjustPosition"
          :cursor="cursor"
          :cursor-color="cursorColor"
          :cursor-spacing="cursorSpacing"
          :selection-start="selectionStart"
          :selection-end="selectionEnd"
          :hold-keyboard="holdKeyboard"
          :always-embed="alwaysEmbed"
          @input="onInput"
          @change="onNativeChange"
          @focus="onFocus"
          @blur="onBlur"
          @confirm="onConfirm"
          @keyboardheightchange="onKeyboardHeightChange"
          @nicknamereview="onNickNameReview"
        />

        <!-- 清除按钮 -->
        <view
          v-if="showClearable"
          class="t-input__wrap--clearable-icon"
          @click.stop="onClear"
        >
          <text class="t-input__clear-fallback">×</text>
        </view>

        <!-- 后置文本（slot 优先） -->
        <view
          v-if="hasSuffixSlot || suffix.length > 0"
          class="t-input__wrap--suffix"
          @click="onSuffixClick"
        >
          <slot name="suffix">
            <text v-if="suffix.length > 0">{{ suffix }}</text>
          </slot>
        </view>

        <!-- 后置图标 -->
        <view
          v-if="hasSuffixIconSlot || suffixIcon.length > 0"
          class="t-input__wrap--suffix-icon"
          @click="onSuffixIconClick"
        >
          <slot name="suffix-icon">
            <text v-if="suffixIcon.length > 0">{{ suffixIcon }}</text>
          </slot>
        </view>
      </view>

      <!-- ③ tips -->
      <view v-if="hasTipsSlot || tips.length > 0" :class="tipsClass">
        <slot name="tips">
          <text v-if="tips.length > 0" class="t-input__tips-text">{{ tips }}</text>
        </slot>
      </view>
    </view>

    <!-- ④ 额外区（如操作按钮） -->
    <slot name="extra" />
  </view>
</template>

<script setup lang="uts">
import { computed, ref, useSlots, watch } from 'vue';
import {
  inputVariants,
  inputControlVariants,
  inputTipsVariants,
} from './t-input.variants';
import { getCharacterLength } from '../../utils/text';
import type {
  InputType,
  InputAlign,
  InputLayout,
  InputStatus,
  InputClearTrigger,
  InputConfirmType,
  InputFormatFn,
} from './t-input.types';

const props = defineProps({
  /** v-model 值 */
  modelValue: { type: String, default: '' },
  /** uniapp 版兼容字段：与 modelValue 等价 */
  value: { type: String, default: '' },
  placeholder: { type: String, default: '' },
  type: { type: String as PropType<InputType>, default: 'text' },
  align: { type: String as PropType<InputAlign>, default: 'left' },
  label: { type: String, default: '' },
  tips: { type: String, default: '' },
  suffix: { type: String, default: '' },
  prefixIcon: { type: String, default: '' },
  suffixIcon: { type: String, default: '' },
  layout: { type: String as PropType<InputLayout>, default: 'horizontal' },
  borderless: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  status: { type: String as PropType<InputStatus>, default: 'default' },
  disabled: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  readonly: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  clearable: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  clearTrigger: { type: String as PropType<InputClearTrigger>, default: 'always' },
  maxlength: { type: Number, default: -1 },
  maxcharacter: { type: Number, default: -1 },
  allowInputOverMax: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  focus: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  confirmType: { type: String as PropType<InputConfirmType>, default: 'done' },
  confirmHold: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  adjustPosition: { type: Boolean, default: true },
  placeholderClass: { type: String, default: 'input-placeholder' },
  placeholderStyle: { type: String, default: '' },
  format: { type: Function as PropType<InputFormatFn | null>, default: null },
  customClass: { type: String, default: '' },
  cursor: { type: Number, default: -1 },
  cursorColor: { type: String, default: '#0052d9' },
  cursorSpacing: { type: Number, default: 0 },
  safePasswordCertPath: { type: String, default: '' },
  safePasswordCustomHash: { type: String, default: '' },
  safePasswordLength: { type: Number, default: 0 },
  safePasswordNonce: { type: String, default: '' },
  safePasswordSalt: { type: String, default: '' },
  safePasswordTimeStamp: { type: Number, default: 0 },
  selectionEnd: { type: Number, default: -1 },
  selectionStart: { type: Number, default: -1 },
  alwaysEmbed: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  autoFocus: { type: Boolean, default: false },
  holdKeyboard: { type: Boolean, default: false },
});

const emit = defineEmits([
  'update:modelValue',
  'update:value',
  'change',
  'focus',
  'blur',
  'clear',
  'enter',
  'click',
  'keyboardheightchange',
  'nicknamereview',
]);

const slots = useSlots();
const hasLabelSlot = computed<boolean>(() => slots.label != null);
const hasPrefixIconSlot = computed<boolean>(() => slots['prefix-icon'] != null);
const hasSuffixSlot = computed<boolean>(() => slots.suffix != null);
const hasSuffixIconSlot = computed<boolean>(() => slots['suffix-icon'] != null);
const hasTipsSlot = computed<boolean>(() => slots.tips != null);

// 是否显示 prefix 区域
const showPrefix = computed<boolean>(() => {
  return hasPrefixIconSlot.value || prefixIcon.length > 0 || hasLabelSlot.value || label.length > 0;
});

// 受控值：modelValue 优先，回退到 value
const dataValue = ref<string>(props.modelValue.length > 0 ? props.modelValue : props.value);

watch(
  () => props.modelValue,
  (v: string) => {
    dataValue.value = v;
  },
);
watch(
  () => props.value,
  (v: string) => {
    if (props.modelValue.length === 0 && v !== dataValue.value) {
      dataValue.value = v;
    }
  },
);

// password 类型在原生 input 上需要把 type 留 text + password=true
const inputType = computed<string>(() => (props.type === 'password' ? 'text' : props.type));

// placeholderClass 默认值对齐 baseline
const finalPlaceholderClass = computed<string>(() => {
  if (props.placeholderClass.length > 0) return props.placeholderClass;
  return 'input-placeholder';
});

// maxlength 行为：allowInputOverMax 时设为 -1 不限制；否则取 maxlength
const effectiveMaxlength = computed<number>(() => {
  if (props.allowInputOverMax) return -1;
  if (props.maxlength > 0) return props.maxlength;
  return -1;
});

// 清除按钮显示规则
const focused = ref<boolean>(false);
const showClearable = computed<boolean>(() => {
  if (!props.clearable) return false;
  if (dataValue.value.length === 0) return false;
  if (props.disabled || props.readonly) return false;
  if (props.clearTrigger === 'focus' && !focused.value) return false;
  return true;
});

// ---- 便捷引用 ----
const label = computed<string>(() => props.label);
const prefixIcon = computed<string>(() => props.prefixIcon);

// ---- 类名 ----
const rootClass = computed<string>(() =>
  inputVariants({
    layout: props.layout,
    align: props.align,
    status: props.status,
    borderless: props.borderless,
    disabled: props.disabled,
    readonly: props.readonly,
    class: props.customClass,
  }),
);
const controlClass = computed<string>(() =>
  inputControlVariants({
    align: props.align,
    disabled: props.disabled,
    readonly: props.readonly,
  }),
);
const tipsClass = computed<string>(() =>
  inputTipsVariants({
    align: props.align,
    status: props.status,
  }),
);

// ---- 内部更新 ----
function updateValue(value: string) {
  let next = value;

  // maxcharacter 截断（allowInputOverMax 关闭时）
  if (!props.allowInputOverMax && props.maxcharacter > 0) {
    const r = getCharacterLength('maxcharacter', value, props.maxcharacter);
    next = r.characters;
  }

  dataValue.value = next;
  emit('update:modelValue', next);
  emit('update:value', next);
}

// ---- events ----
function onInput(e: UniInputEvent) {
  const v = e.detail.value;
  const cursor = e.detail.cursor;
  updateValue(v);
  emit('change', { value: dataValue.value, cursor });
}

function onNativeChange(e: UniInputEvent) {
  // 仅 nickname 类型走原生 change
  if (props.type !== 'nickname') return;
  const v = e.detail.value;
  updateValue(v);
  emit('change', { value: dataValue.value });
}

function onFocus(e: UniFocusEvent) {
  focused.value = true;
  emit('focus', { value: dataValue.value });
}

function onBlur(e: UniBlurEvent) {
  focused.value = false;
  // 失焦时执行 format
  if (props.format != null) {
    const fmt = props.format as InputFormatFn;
    const next = fmt(e.detail.value);
    updateValue(next);
  }
  emit('blur', { value: dataValue.value });
}

function onConfirm(_e: UniInputConfirmEvent) {
  emit('enter', { value: dataValue.value });
}

function onClear() {
  updateValue('');
  emit('clear', { value: '' });
  emit('change', { value: '' });
}

function onClick() {
  emit('click', { trigger: 'input' });
}
function onSuffixClick() {
  emit('click', { trigger: 'suffix' });
}
function onSuffixIconClick() {
  emit('click', { trigger: 'suffix-icon' });
}

function onKeyboardHeightChange(e: UniInputEvent) {
  emit('keyboardheightchange', e.detail);
}
function onNickNameReview(e: UniInputEvent) {
  emit('nicknamereview', e.detail);
}
</script>

<style lang="less">
@import './t-input.theme.less';
</style>
<<<END>>>
